title: TEEN DROP-IN SERVICES - 211info
text: CASCADE YOUTH AND FAMILY CENTER THE LOFT TEEN DROP-IN SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a drop-in center. Offers a food pantry, help applying for state benefits such as OHP and SNAP, showers, laundry facilities. Also offers assistance with educational needs such as re-enrollment, school supplies, and specialized information and referral. Eligibility: Ages 11-24 that are homeless and unaccompanied by an adult Hours: Tuesday/Thursday noon-4pm Email (800) 660-0934 Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (800) 660-0934 Hotline Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None LANGUAGES: English, Spanish by arrangement AREA SERVED: Crook, Deschutes, and Jefferson Counties TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Cascade East Bus line 11 Services: Certificates/Forms Assistance * Homeless Youth Food Pantries * Homeless Youth Food Preparation Facilities * Homeless Youth Laundry Facilities * Homeless Youth Public Internet Access Sites * Homeless Youth Public Showers/Baths * Homeless Youth Specialized Information and Referral * Homelessness Issues Youth Centers Other Services Offered At This Location: EMPLOYMENT - YOUTH EMPLOYMENT SERVICES HOUSING/SHELTER - LIVING OPTIONS FOR TEENS INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - STREET OUTREACH PROGRAM If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. No Mapping Information Available
